---
title: "China"
subtitle: "1,136 posts where this was the primary topic."
---

<script src="https://cdn.plot.ly/plotly-2.35.2.min.js"></script>

<style>
  h1 { border-bottom-color: #A63D2A !important; }
</style>


<div id="theme-volume" class="volume-chart"></div>
<script>
  (function () {
    var d = [{ x: ["2011", "2012", "2013", "2014", "2015", "2016", "2017", "2018", "2019", "2020", "2021", "2022", "2023", "2024", "2025", "2026"], y: [63, 185, 83, 29, 27, 13, 46, 76, 155, 135, 3, 26, 114, 45, 108, 28],
                type: "bar", marker: { color: "#A63D2A" } }];
    var l = {
      margin: { t: 10, r: 10, b: 35, l: 40 },
      paper_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      plot_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      xaxis: { tickfont: { family: "Libre Franklin" } },
      yaxis: { tickfont: { family: "Libre Franklin" } },
      height: 260, showlegend: false
    };
    Plotly.newPlot("theme-volume", d, l, {displayModeBar: false, responsive: true});
  })();
</script>


<p class="small-caps">Recurring phrases</p>
<span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#A63D2A'>united states</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#A63D2A'>north korea</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#A63D2A'>https www</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#A63D2A'>http bit</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#A63D2A'>joe biden</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#A63D2A'>donald trump</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#A63D2A'>president china</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#A63D2A'>china will</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#A63D2A'>states america</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#A63D2A'>cont http</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#A63D2A'>billions dollars</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#A63D2A'>south korea</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#A63D2A'>other countries</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#A63D2A'>trade deal</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#A63D2A'>deal china</span>


::: {.muted}
Showing the top 40 posts ranked by how clearly they match this theme. Other secondary themes for each post are shown as chips.
:::

<div class="post-stream">

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2019">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 23, 2019  16:00</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;For many years China (and many other countries) has been taking advantage of the United States on Trade</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1165005927864512512" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1165005927864512512" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2019">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 03, 2019  20:46</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;Things are going along very well with China. They are paying us Tens of Billions of Dollars</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1157633906025402368" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1157633906025402368" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2018">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Dec 15, 2018  00:35</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;China just announced that their economy is growing much slower than anticipated because of our Trade War with them. They have just suspended U.S. Tariff Hikes. U.S. is doing very well. China wants to make a big and very comprehensive deal. It could happen</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1073617541476569088" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1073617541476569088" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2019">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 13, 2019  18:49</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;I say openly to President Xi &amp;amp; all of my many friends in China that China will be hurt very badly if you don’t make a deal because companies will be forced to leave China for other countries. Too expensive to buy in China. You had a great deal</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #415B6F">Foreign Policy</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1127888569543077888" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1127888569543077888" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2019">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 06, 2019  00:00</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;China is intent on continuing to receive the hundreds of Billions of Dollars they have been taking from the U.S. with unfair trade practices and currency manipulation. So one-sided</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1158407373666566145" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1158407373666566145" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2018">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Dec 15, 2018  00:25</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;China just announce the there economy is growing much slower than anticipated because of our Trade War with them. They have just suspended U.S. Tariff Hikes. U.S. is doing very well. China wants to make a big and very comprehensive deal. It could happen</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1073615092028203008" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1073615092028203008" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2018">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Nov 29, 2018  20:32</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;Billions of Dollars are pouring into the coffers of the U.S.A. because of the Tariffs being charged to China</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1068120444279103488" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1068120444279103488" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2018">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Apr 04, 2018  19:22</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;We are not in a trade war with China</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #415B6F">Foreign Policy</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_981492087328792577" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/981492087328792577" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2019">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 14, 2019  19:29</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;....This money will come from the massive Tariffs being paid to the United States for allowing China</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1128261067422019584" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1128261067422019584" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2019">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 11, 2019  05:58</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;China wants to make a deal so badly. Thousands of companies are leaving because of the Tariffs</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1160309383701680129" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1160309383701680129" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2018">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 21, 2018  21:16</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;Under our potential deal with China</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_998553122179084290" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/998553122179084290" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2017">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 30, 2017  07:29</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;I am very disappointed in China. Our foolish past leaders have allowed them to make hundreds of billions of dollars a year in trade</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_891440474132795392" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/891440474132795392" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2017">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2017  17:47</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;China has been taking out massive amounts of money &amp; wealth from the U.S. in totally one-sided trade</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_816068355555815424" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/816068355555815424" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2019">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 23, 2019  16:00</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;...unfair Trading Relationship. China should not have put new Tariffs on 75 BILLION DOLLARS of United States product (politically motivated!). Starting on October 1st</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1165005929831702529" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1165005929831702529" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2019">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 30, 2019  19:48</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;“China Trade Turmoil: China Urging a CALM AND RATIONAL Solution.” @MariaBartiromo @FoxBusiness China is doing very poorly while the USA</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1178637628662538245" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1178637628662538245" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 30, 2025  12:09</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">Two weeks ago China was in grave economic danger! The very high Tariffs I set made it virtually impossible for China to TRADE into the United States marketplace which is, by far, number one in the World. We went, in effect, COLD TURKEY with China, and it was devastating for them. Many factories closed and there was, to put it mildly, âcivil unrest.â I saw what was happening and didnât like it, for them, not for us. I made a FAST DEAL with China in order to save them from what I thought was going to be a very bad situation, and I didnât want to see that happen. Because of this deal, everything quickly stabilized and China got back to business as usual. Everybody was happy! That is the good news!!! The bad news is that China, perhaps not surprisingly to some, HAS TOTALLY VIOLATED ITS AGREEMENT WITH US. So much for being Mr. NICE GUY!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_114596705340367716" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/114596705340367716" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2018">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 14, 2018  03:22</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;China and the United States are working well together on trade</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_995746011321597953" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/995746011321597953" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2018">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 18, 2018  20:55</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;.....China has been taking advantage of the United States on Trade for many years. They also know that I am the one that knows how to stop it. There will be great and fast economic retaliation against China if our farmers</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1042034269374361600" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1042034269374361600" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2018">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 07, 2018  23:10</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;China has been asked to develop a plan for the year of a One Billion Dollar reduction in their massive Trade Deficit with the United States. Our relationship with China has been a very good one</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_971402791930552322" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/971402791930552322" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2018">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Dec 05, 2018  08:20</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;We are either going to have a REAL DEAL with China</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1070110615627333632" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1070110615627333632" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jun 11, 2025  12:04</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">OUR DEAL WITH CHINA IS DONE, SUBJECT TO FINAL APPROVAL WITH PRESIDENT XI AND ME. FULL MAGNETS, AND ANY NECESSARY RARE EARTHS, WILL BE SUPPLIED, UP FRONT, BY CHINA. LIKEWISE, WE WILL PROVIDE TO CHINA WHAT WAS AGREED TO, INCLUDING CHINESE STUDENTS USING OUR COLLEGES AND UNIVERSITIES (WHICH HAS ALWAYS BEEN GOOD WITH ME!). WE ARE GETTING A TOTAL OF 55% TARIFFS, CHINA IS GETTING 10%. RELATIONSHIP IS EXCELLENT! THANK YOU FOR YOUR ATTENTION TO THIS MATTER!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_114664632971715644" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/114664632971715644" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2013">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 31, 2013  04:43</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;China is already preparing to benefit economically from this mess. They will pick up the pieces and make yet another fortune-&amp; laugh at us!&quot;</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_373742774597992448" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/373742774597992448" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2019">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 13, 2019  18:40</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;..There will be nobody left in China to do business with. Very bad for China</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1127886309316599808" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1127886309316599808" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2019">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 13, 2019  23:55</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;..There will be nobody left in China to do business with. Very bad for China</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1127965569821626368" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1127965569821626368" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2013">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 21, 2013  14:35</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;China is not our friend. They are not our ally. They want to overtake us</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #415B6F">Foreign Policy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_304690887248707584" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/304690887248707584" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2012">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2012.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 22, 2012  14:59</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;&#x27;America&#x27;s relationship with China is at a crossroads. We only have a short window of time to make the tough (cont) http://tl.gd/g2ida8&quot;</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #415B6F">Foreign Policy</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_172425301853351937" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/172425301853351937" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Apr 05, 2025  12:34</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">China has been hit much harder than the USA, not even close. They, and many other nations, have treated us unsustainably badly. We have been the dumb and helpless âwhipping post,â but not any longer. We are bringing back jobs and businesses like never before. Already, more than FIVE TRILLION DOLLARS OF INVESTMENT, and rising fast! THIS IS AN ECONOMIC REVOLUTION, AND WE WILL WIN. HANG TOUGH, it wonât be easy, but the end result will be historic. We will, MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!!!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_114285375813275308" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/114285375813275308" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2020">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 16, 2020  21:41</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;One of the greatest trade deals ever made! Also good for China and our long term relationship. 250 Billion Dollars will be coming back to our Country</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1217804029599920128" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1217804029599920128" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2019">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2019  22:52</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;The United States Treasury has taken in MANY billions of dollars from the Tariffs we are charging China and other countries that have not treated us fairly. In the meantime we are doing well in various Trade Negotiations currently going on. At some point this had to be done!&quot;</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1080839254656405504" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1080839254656405504" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2018">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Apr 08, 2018  02:03</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;The United States hasn’t had a Trade Surplus with China in 40 years. They must end unfair trade</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_982680387116781568" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/982680387116781568" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2013">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 07, 2013  15:24</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;China keeps manipulating its currency at our financial expense. Why do our leaders continually let China run all over us?&quot;</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_299629835213500416" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/299629835213500416" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2018">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 15, 2018  20:35</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;Trade negotiations are continuing with China. They have been making hundreds of billions of dollars a year from the U.S.</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_996368474556583937" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/996368474556583937" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2014">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2014.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Nov 25, 2014  02:07</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;As China and the rest of the World continue to rip off the U.S. economically</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_537155665635344385" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/537155665635344385" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2012">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2012.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 28, 2012  09:42</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;&#x27;America&#x27;s relationship with China is at a crossroads. We only have a short window of time to make the tough (cont) http://tl.gd/gm9oid&quot;</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #415B6F">Foreign Policy</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_185014028706394112" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/185014028706394112" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2020">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 06, 2020  20:28</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;China has caused great damage to the United States and the rest of the World!&quot;</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1280116392990253056" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1280116392990253056" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2012">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2012.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 06, 2012  14:21</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;&#x27;While China screws us with every turn of its currency</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_177126743491084288" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/177126743491084288" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2023">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2023.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jun 26, 2023  01:06</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">BIDEN is being PAID OFF by CHINA…</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_110607832287208617" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/110607832287208617" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2016">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2016.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2016  21:39</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ iLoveiDevices: @ EdwinRo47796972 @ happyjack225 @ FoxNews @ krauthammer Minimizing dependency on China is crucial.Only Trump talks about that&quot;</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4B6A88">COVID / Health</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_684217554861199360" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/684217554861199360" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Apr 05, 2025  21:30</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">âWe need Tariffs on China!â  Gordon Chang</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_114287485415940651" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/114287485415940651" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2020">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Dec 20, 2020  03:19</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;The entire WORLD is being badly hurt by the China Virus</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4B6A88">COVID / Health</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1340376176695631872" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1340376176695631872" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

</div>

::: {.seal-divider}
![](../assets/seal.svg){width=60}
:::

[← Back to all topics](../themes.qmd){.small-caps}
